<?php /** * PrivateDomainName * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * PrivateDomainName * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class PrivateDomainName { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_CHOICE, 'children' => [ 'numeric' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_NUMERIC_STRING], 'printable' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_PRINTABLE_STRING] ] ]; }
